name: Hannah Zhou
shortBio: Covers Chengdu and Chongqing with a focus on food culture, night districts, subculture, and how city character shapes the trip.
fullBio: Hannah Zhou is a Southwest features editor at China Travel Notes. She leads Chengdu and Chongqing coverage, especially pieces where food, nightlife, neighborhood energy, street culture, and urban mood matter as much as standard sightseeing. Her work helps readers understand why two cities can feel equally famous but radically different on the ground.
reviewProcess: Hannah reviews pages for food usefulness, evening logic, neighborhood specificity, and whether a stop contributes to the city's real character rather than only online popularity.
seoDescription: Read Chengdu and Chongqing city guides and features by Hannah Zhou at China Travel Notes.
